title: Rockwater Guitar Hotel — True Shape
subtitle: Body-only slab with real guitar outline, center notch + mast headstocks, string stripe, floor-line glass banding
author: Max

sections.title: Guitar Tower
sections.note: 46-band body outline, notch + masts, strings, floor banding.

bricks.note: Lay the full 64x30 podium first — everything keys off its top surface (z=1).
Ground story solid; upper stories carry the glass ribbon on the street faces.
Body base — the tower is a constant-depth glass slab whose width follows the guitar-body outline.
Waist: the deep pinch that defines the silhouette.
Top notch begins — the face splits around the neck heel, where the mast clusters will stand.
Mast cluster — the thin spires that read as the guitars' headstocks.
Lagoon with trans-clear water tiles, 8 palms, hedge rows.
